# SFG from velocity-velocity correlation functions

## Compile the code
```
make
```

## Run the code
```
make_input_files.sh pos.lammpstrj
./sfg.x pos.lammpstrj vel.lammpstrj input_sfg
```

*pos.lammpstrj* is the lammps trajectory file in atomic format (positions in reduced coordinates)
*vel.lammpstrj* is a lammps trajectory file containing the atomic velocities (using custom dump "id type vx vy vz"
*input_sfg* is the input file generated by *make_input_files.sh*
